seed_problem: Frontier-CS cant_be_late offline / ALE-Bench spot-vs-on-demand replay
mutation: composite: replay the online spot/on-demand/pause deadline trace as a STATIC full-trace optimization, and generalize the single-resource cost problem into a multi-section single-ship scheduling+coverage problem (jobs with deadlines + time-varying spot capacity/cost) whose exact optimum is combinatorial
title: Abyssal Cable Deployment: Spot-Weather Replay
strategies: all-on-demand EDF baseline (the reference cost B)
safe spot-swap greedy: replace on-demand steps by spot only where spot is at least as productive (cap>=D) and cheaper
per-section cost-per-unit coverage: re-cover each section (earliest deadline first) from its own slots plus idle slots, packing cheap sub-D spot windows and freeing on-demand steps
deadline-aware planning / local search reserving high-capacity cheap spot windows for the most work-heavy sections and using on-demand only for residual near tight deadlines
